name: DARRA - All That Remains
description:
UPDATE: ADDED SCRIPT

I gotta say, lambda sure was a real help with this bot (HE DIDN'T DO JACK SHIT.)

But anyways, I'm tired, I need to get this bot out there so that I can start work on another one. I'm so tired that I'm using uppercase letters. That's how tired I am.

I reccomend you read the character's description to get an understanding of the lore if you don't know it.

This bot does include some unofficial lore, and things made up for the bot, some story changes, blah blah blah. It also includes potential kidnapping, so, you've been warned.

The creator of all of this is called 4four44

There's your link to their deviantart, here's their toyhouse where i got all the lore from:

here's all the major characters:

zhara, vash, and san are all clone bases, pi (the crossed out character) isn't in the bot, and all members of uragan are clones.

Uragan:

Lambda did absolutely nothing to help with this bot, all epsilon, all the time.

Canadian Dating Simulator bot is next.
creator: thE_onE
